programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A surveillance camera captures a woman vanishing from her bed as she sleeps next to her husband in their suburban English home; experts investigate and uncover numerous police records that report a strange pattern of nearby alien abductions.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Footage of a wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A bizarre, tentacled black mass emerges from the seas on an island in the Caribbean, and on-lookers are horrified as it writhes ashore; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate the origin of this alien invader.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A surveillance camera captures a woman vanishing from her bed as she sleeps next to her husband in their suburban English home; experts investigate and uncover numerous police records that report a strange pattern of nearby alien abductions.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Footage of a wolf-like creature in the remote wilderness of northern Canada could be evidence of a dire wolf, a prehistoric beast that went extinct at the end of the last Ice Age; experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate if it has returned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A boy who can turn his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison; officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: In 2014, Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 vanishes; rescue crews search its last known position but find nothing; the fate of the flight remains a mystery; theories abound but facts are few.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: Kari, Tory and Grant put their lives on the line as they test a classic tale from the farmyard; we've all heard it, if you have to cross a field with a bull, the last thing you want to do is wear red.

programme.desc: The team tests Superhero gadgets including the grappling hook, the phantom ring punch and the phone booth change.

programme.desc: Adam and Jamie put the pedal to the metal and set out to test two tall tales from the street racing world; they investigate whether oversteering increases agility and if reverse parking is still possible using the drifting technique.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, a ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history; armed with pioneering satellite imagery, experts investigate the dark mysteries behind the ancient structure.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery; today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: A prehistoric mega-structure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries of the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3D imaging analysis, experts uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Archaeologists decode cryptic inscriptions and use innovative geophysical analysis to reveal the secrets of Mount Nemrut in southeastern Turkey.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: The legendary metropolis of Xanadu and its fabled existence have mystified experts for centuries; archaeologists use cutting-edge aerial imaging to investigate new discoveries and reveal the truth behind this mythical lost city.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.sub-title: Seven Wonders of the Silk Road
programme.desc: The Silk Road was the ancient trade route that connected Eastern and Western worlds. The road traveled through many countries and was a source of ancient mystery. Even today, the road is shrouded in mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Palmyra: pearl of the Syrian Desert; experts return to the site and use CGI reconstruction to reveal the secrets of Palmyra's ancient engineers.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.sub-title: Seven Wonders of the Silk Road
programme.desc: The Silk Road was the ancient trade route that connected Eastern and Western worlds. The road traveled through many countries and was a source of ancient mystery. Even today, the road is shrouded in mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Palmyra: pearl of the Syrian Desert; experts return to the site and use CGI reconstruction to reveal the secrets of Palmyra's ancient engineers.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: The legendary metropolis of Xanadu and its fabled existence have mystified experts for centuries; archaeologists use cutting-edge aerial imaging to investigate new discoveries and reveal the truth behind this mythical lost city.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, a ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history; armed with pioneering satellite imagery, experts investigate the dark mysteries behind the ancient structure.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Venice was once a fearsome superpower home to secrets, wealth, and treachery; today, scientists use pioneering acoustic imaging technology to discover the city's ancient foundations and reveal how it's still standing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A piece of the sun seems to have vanished; the Hubble spots an unidentified object traveling faster than light.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Soviet photos of the moon are intercepted by the CIA; a malfunction aboard the ISS, which imperils the whole crew; NASA probe finds evidence of the possibility of life on Mars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts mysteriously die as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why; a declassified document shows a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: With more than 80 moons, Saturn could rank among the most dynamic planetary system in Sol's neighborhood; with its giant underground oceans and protective magnetic fields, experts explore how Saturn's moons offer new insight into the Solar System.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Dark Matter is thought to be the cosmic glue that holds the universe together, yet the search for it continues to eluded scientists today.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: Terrifying new discoveries reveal the bloody truth behind the legends of vampires, and experts investigate why people believed these monsters had a taste for human blood.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: Werewolves were once so feared, people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures, and new evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mythical Beasts
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city; now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Ancient documents and legends suggest that the Ark of the Covenant may have been stolen by Roman legions and hidden in Rome; a team of archaeologists explore mystery cults and ancient catacombs to uncover the truth behind this treasured artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Ancient scriptures describe the Ark of the Covenant as possessing an almighty force with the capacity to kill; now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path in a quest to discover the truth behind its mythical power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hides the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping; a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The holy order of the Knights Templar are believed to have located and seized the Ark of the Covenant centuries ago; now, expert historians follow the trail of this elusive order to uncover the truth behind this sacred relic's mysterious journey.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Some allege that the Ark of the Covenant was stolen by King Solomon's son and taken to Ethiopia thousands of years ago; now, archaeologists investigate new, mysterious leads to uncover the secrets behind this lost relic's elusive journey.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hides the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping; a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.
